mapper.insert: INSERT INTO isa ( isa_us_num, isa_year, isa_type, isa_total_amount, isa_created ) VALUES ( #{isaUsNum}, #{isaYear}, #{isaType}, #{isaTotalAmount}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT isa_num AS isaNum, isa_us_num AS isaUsNum, isa_year AS isaYear, isa_type AS isaType, isa_total_amount AS isaTotalAmount, isa_created AS isaCreated FROM isa WHERE isa_us_num = #{usNum}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO isa_deposit_log ( isa_deposit_log_isa_num, isa_deposit_log_amount, isa_deposit_log_memo, isa_deposit_log_created ) VALUES ( #{isaDepositLogIsaNum}, #{isaDepositLogAmount}, #{isaDepositLogMemo}, NOW() )
